channel.title: AI Agents for Work on The SaaS Education
channel.description: Recent content in AI Agents for Work on The SaaS Education

item.title: AI Agents Are Becoming the New Operating Layer for Modern Teams
item.description: AI agents are moving from experiments into everyday operations. The useful question is no longer whether teams will adopt them, but which processes are ready first.

item.title: Where AI Actually Improves Customer Support
item.description: AI in support works best when it gives people more context and more time. Deflection is useful, but quality and resolution speed remain the metrics that matter.
